narrative.headline: Managed money piling short on wheat as AU/CA/RU lobby intensifies
narrative.body: CFTC shows managed money net short wheat at 2.8σ above baseline, coinciding with fresh lobbying from Australian and Canadian agricultural and defense-adjacent firms. Likely speculative positioning ahead of a supply-side catalyst — tariff disruption, Russian export policy, or Southern Hemisphere harvest revision.
